description_long: This object is a cylindrical cigarette, featuring a white paper-wrapped body and a tan-colored filter at one end. The filter is separated from the main body by a faint, slightly darker band, typical of commercial cigarettes. The opposite end of the filter displays a darkened, burnt tip with some visible ash, indicating it has been lit. The cigarette is slender and straight, with a smooth, matte finish on the paper and a slightly rougher texture at the burnt end. No branding, logos, or text are visible on the exterior. The overall appearance is consistent with a standard filtered cigarette commonly found in urban environments.
description: A slender, white cigarette with a tan filter and a burnt, ashy tip. The surface is smooth except for the rough, darkened end.
description_view_0: The cigarette is viewed from the filter end, showing the tan filter and a small dark circle at the tip.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length, with the tan filter on the left and the white paper body extending to the right.
description_view_2: The cigarette is seen from the burnt end, displaying the dark, ashy tip and the cylindrical white body.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, with the tan filter on the right and the white body extending to the left.
attribute_burn_mark: Dark charring and discoloration are visible at the tip opposite the filter.
